mapper.sql: exchange_rate_id, currency_code, target_currency, rate_to_krw, rate_date, provider, fetched_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_rate ( currency_code, target_currency, rate_to_krw, rate_date, provider, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{currencyCode}, #{targetCurrency}, #{rateToKrw}, #{rateDate}, #{provider}, #{fetchedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rate_to_krw = VALUES(rate_to_krw), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at), updated_at = NOW(6)
